Tool_health_insurance_Description: Estimate how much health cover your family may need by age, members, and city tier — plus any gap vs current cover.
Tool_health_insurance_Subtitle: Coverage need estimator (not a premium quote)
Tool_health_insurance_LearnText: Hospital costs vary by city and family size. This educational estimator starts from a ₹5 lakh base, adds per-member and age add-ons, then a metro/tier bump. Compare with your current sum insured to see the gap. It does not quote insurer premiums.
Tool_health_insurance_FormulaNote: Rules of thumb only — actual cover depends on medical history, room-rent limits, and insurer underwriting. Use Section 80D for tax on premiums paid.
Tool_health_insurance_TierHint: Metros usually need a higher sum insured for the same care.
Tool_health_insurance_CurrentHint: Optional — leave 0 if you have no policy yet.
Tool_health_insurance_Result_GapOk: Current cover meets or exceeds estimate
Tool_health_insurance_VerdictGap: Suggested sum insured ≈ {0}. You may want about {1} more cover.
Tool_health_insurance_VerdictOk: Your current cover meets the suggested ≈ {0}.
Tool_health_insurance_ScenarioSubtitle: Same family, different city cost tiers
Tool_health_insurance_Info_Purpose: Estimate a sensible sum insured for your family before shopping for a policy.
Tool_health_insurance_Info_WhyKnow: Under-insurance is common; metro hospital bills can wipe out a small floater quickly.
Tool_health_insurance_Info_RealLife: Choosing a family floater amount when renewing or buying health insurance.
Tool_health_insurance_Info_Goal_3: Know the gap vs current cover
Tool_health_insurance_Info_Alt_80d_When: To estimate tax deduction on premiums paid.
Tool_health_insurance_Info_Alt_80d_Examp: Self + parents premiums under old regime.
Tool_health_insurance_Info_Alt_Emergency: 6 months of expenses in liquid savings.
Tool_health_insurance_Info_Alt_Tax_When: To see overall tax after deductions.
Tool_health_insurance_Info_Differentiati: FinYatra sizes educational cover need by age, members, and city — not a premium marketplace quote.
Tool_health_insurance_Info_Motto: Size the cover first — then compare policies.
Tool_rent_receipt_Description: Summarise monthly rent paid for HRA records — totals and a month-by-month table.
Tool_rent_receipt_Subtitle: Rent paid summary for HRA paperwork
Tool_rent_receipt_LearnText: Enter monthly rent and how many months you paid. Optionally add landlord, tenant, and address for a clear summary. This builds totals and a monthly table for your records — not a stamped PDF. Use the HRA calculator to estimate exemption.
Tool_rent_receipt_FormulaNote: Keep landlord PAN if annual rent exceeds ₹1 lakh (employer may ask). This tool only totals amounts.
Tool_rent_receipt_HraTipBody: Rent receipts support your HRA claim under the old tax regime. Estimate exemption with the
Tool_rent_receipt_BreakdownSubtitle: Same rent each month in this summary
Tool_rent_receipt_ExampleStep_4: List each month at ₹25,000 for your records.
Tool_rent_receipt_ExampleStep_5: Use the HRA calculator with annual rent ₹3,00,000 to estimate exemption.
Tool_rent_receipt_Step_4: Optional: add landlord / tenant / address for the summary.
Tool_rent_receipt_Info_Purpose: Total rent paid and list months for HRA / employer records.
Tool_rent_receipt_Info_WhyKnow: Employers often ask for rent proofs when claiming HRA exemption.
Tool_rent_receipt_Info_RealLife: Salaried tenants preparing year-end HRA documents.
Tool_rent_receipt_Info_Alt_Hra_When: To compute tax-exempt HRA from rent and basic.
Tool_rent_receipt_Info_Alt_Salary_When: To see in-hand after PF, PT, and tax.
Tool_rent_receipt_Info_Alt_Tax_When: To compare old vs new regime with HRA.
Tool_rent_receipt_Info_Alt_Tax_Example: Old regime with HRA vs new regime.
Tool_rent_receipt_Info_Differentiation: FinYatra totals rent and shows a monthly table for records — pair it with the HRA tool for exemption.
Tool_rent_receipt_Info_Motto: Total the rent — then claim HRA correctly.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_Description: See interest saved if you prepay — compare reducing EMI vs reducing tenure.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_Subtitle: Reduce EMI vs reduce tenure after prepay
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_LearnText: A lump-sum prepayment cuts outstanding principal. You can keep the same tenure and lower EMI, or keep the same EMI and finish earlier. This tool recalculates both paths and shows interest saved versus continuing as-is.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_FormulaNote: Uses standard reducing-balance EMI. Check your lender for prepayment charges and whether they default to EMI or tenure reduction.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_PrepayHint: One-time lump sum applied to principal now.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_VerdictTenure: Reducing tenure saves about {0} in interest and finishes in {1} months.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_VerdictEmi: Reducing EMI saves about {0}; new EMI ≈ {1}.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_ScenarioSubtit: Same prepay — lower EMI or shorter tenure
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_ExampleStep_1: Compute current EMI on ₹30L for 180 months at 8.5%.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_ExampleStep_3: Reduce EMI: recalculate EMI on ₹25L for 180 months.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_ExampleStep_4: Reduce tenure: keep current EMI; solve months for ₹25L.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_ExampleStep_5: Interest saved = original remaining interest − new path interest.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_Step_1: Compute current EMI on outstanding principal.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_Step_3: Option A: same months → new EMI. Option B: same EMI → new months.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_Step_4: Compare interest saved on both paths.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_Info_Abbreviat: Home loan prepayment — EMI vs tenure
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_Info_Purpose: Compare reducing EMI versus reducing tenure after a lump-sum prepayment.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_Info_WhyKnow: The same prepay can free cash flow (lower EMI) or cut years of interest (shorter tenure).
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_Info_RealLife: Using a bonus or FD maturity to part-prepay a home loan.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_Info_Goal_1: See new EMI if tenure stays the same
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_Info_Goal_2: See shorter tenure if EMI stays the same
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_Info_Alt_Emi_W: For a generic loan EMI from scratch.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_Info_Alt_Home_: For full home-loan EMI and tax notes.
New loan EMI + old-regime interest benefit.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_Info_Different: FinYatra shows both reduce-EMI and reduce-tenure outcomes with interest saved side by side.
Tool_home_loan_prepayment_Info_Motto: Prepay with a plan — EMI or tenure, not both by accident.
